name: QNI : Spam/Phishing URL Accessed
notes: This rule triggers when a URL categorized by X-Force as "Spam URLs" or "Phishing URLs" is accessed. This may indicate that a user targeted in a spam/phishing campaign has opened a malicious URL.
conditions_text: when the flow matches HTTP Host is not N/A
when any of Web Categories match (Spam|Phishing) URLs
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Spam/Phishing URL Accessed on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches HTTP Host is not N/A
AND when any of Web Categories match (Spam|Phishing) URLs
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Spam/Phishing URL Accessed
Event description: Detects when a URL categorized as "Spam URLs" or "Phishing URLs" has been accessed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
